findings.title: modelscope/evalscope
findings.description: A streamlined and customizable framework for efficient large model (LLM, VLM, AIGC) evaluation and performance benchmarking.

findings.title: beir-cellar/beir
findings.description: A Heterogeneous Benchmark for Information Retrieval. Easy to use, evaluate your models across 15+ diverse IR datasets.

findings.description: 📰 Must-read papers and blogs on LLM based Long Context Modeling 🔥

findings.title: onejune2018/Awesome-LLM-Eval
findings.description: Awesome-LLM-Eval: a curated list of tools, datasets/benchmark, demos, leaderboard, papers, docs and models, mainly for Evaluation on LLMs.  一个由工具、基准/数据、演示、排行榜和大模型等组成的精选列表，主要面向基础大模型评测，旨在探求生成式AI的技术边界.

findings.title: GraphRAG-Bench/GraphRAG-Benchmark
findings.description: The official repo of GraphRAG-Bench for evaluating GraphRAG models. "When to use Graphs in RAG: A Comprehensive Analysis for Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation".  (ICLR'26)

findings.title: illuin-tech/vidore-benchmark
findings.description: Vision Document Retrieval (ViDoRe): Benchmark. Evaluation code for the ColPali paper.

findings.description: Unified benchmark for evaluating conversational memory and RAG across multiple datasets

findings.title: DocAILab/XRAG
findings.description: XRAG: eXamining the Core - Benchmarking Foundational Component Modules in Advanced Retrieval-Augmented Generation

findings.title: RUC-NLPIR/OmniEval
findings.description: Open source code of the paper: "OmniEval: An Omnidirectional and Automatic RAG Evaluation Benchmark in Financial Domain"

findings.title: RagView/RagView
findings.description: We believe that every SOTA result is only valid on its own dataset. RAGView provides a unified evaluation platform to benchmark different RAG methods on your specific data.

findings.title: nlpai-lab/MIRAGE
findings.description: MIRAGE is a light benchmark to evaluate RAG performance.

findings.description: This repository helps you evaluate your models on the FreshStack benchmark!

findings.description: Red Team AI Benchmark: Evaluating Uncensored LLMs for Offensive Security

findings.title: project-miracl/nomiracl
findings.description: NoMIRACL: A multilingual hallucination evaluation dataset to evaluate LLM robustness in RAG against first-stage retrieval errors on 18 languages.

findings.description: KITE (Knowledge-Intensive Task Evaluation) is an end-to-end benchmark for RAG pipelines
